description: 20 NASSCOM firm IT helpdesk scenarios — all three Hands + 6 departments (Set NS)

cases.title: Forgot Password Cannot Login NASSCOM Member Portal
cases.description: Forgot my NASSCOM member portal password and self-service reset link expired. Cannot login to access event registration and industry reports. Need password reset before webinar tomorrow.

cases.title: Conference Room Printer Paper Jam Red Light
cases.description: HP printer in NASSCOM Bangalore office conference room has paper jam. Red jam indicator on, cannot print attendee badges for tomorrow's DeepTech summit session.

cases.title: Cisco VPN Error 807 Cannot Connect From Home
cases.description: Cisco AnyConnect VPN to NASSCOM corporate network fails with Error 807 from home office. Cannot access internal wiki or submit timesheet. Internet connection works fine.

cases.title: Google Chrome Shows Blank White Pages Only
cases.description: Google Chrome browser shows blank white page for all websites on work laptop. Microsoft Edge works fine on same machine. Cleared cache but issue persists.

cases.title: Outlook Desktop Search Returns No Results
cases.description: Microsoft Outlook desktop search returns no results for any email in mailbox. Web Outlook search works correctly. Need to find NASSCOM leadership meeting invite from last week.

cases.title: Wi-Fi Password Prompt Loop on MacBook
cases.description: Corporate Wi-Fi on MacBook keeps prompting for password in a loop. Credentials are correct but never connects. Wired ethernet port on desk works normally.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Desktop Keeps Crashing on Launch
cases.description: Microsoft Teams desktop app crashes within 30 seconds of opening on Windows 11. Teams web version works in browser. Reinstall did not fix the issue.

cases.title: New Intern AD Account and Email Provisioning
cases.description: New intern joining NASSCOM Mumbai office Monday — need Active Directory account, corporate email, and VPN access provisioned per HR onboarding checklist ONB-NS-112.

cases.title: PostgreSQL Connection Pool Exhausted Member DB
cases.description: PostgreSQL member database connection pool exhausted on pg-member-prod. NASSCOM portal member login API returning HTTP 500 errors since 10 AM IST.

cases.title: Laptop USB-C Dock Monitor Not Detected
cases.description: Dell USB-C docking station — external monitor not detected when laptop connected. Laptop screen works, dock power LED green. Needed for dual-screen policy work.

cases.title: Firewall Whitelist Vendor API for Event Platform
cases.description: Need corporate firewall rule to allow outbound HTTPS to event registration vendor API events.nasscom-vendor.com port 443. Change request CR-NS-441 approved.

cases.title: SharePoint Policy Document Library Access Denied
cases.description: Entire policy team getting Access Denied on NASSCOM SharePoint governance document library. Site worked yesterday. Need contributor access for 6 team members.

cases.title: Snowflake Analytics Warehouse Credit Exhausted
cases.description: Snowflake warehouse WH_INDUSTRY_INSIGHTS auto-suspended due to credit quota exhaustion. Industry analytics dashboards and Tableau reports failing since midnight.

cases.title: Resigned Employee Revoke All System Access
cases.description: Employee resigned effective today — immediate offboarding: disable AD account, revoke O365 license, VPN, Salesforce, and member portal admin access per HR ticket.

cases.title: NetApp Snapshot Restore Deleted Research Data
cases.description: Industry research data accidentally deleted from NetApp NAS share. Need snapshot restore from last night before NASSCOM annual report publication deadline.

cases.title: Phishing Email Targeting Finance Team
cases.description: Security incident: NASSCOM finance team received phishing email mimicking invoice vendor with malicious PDF attachment. Two staff opened file before SOC alert.

cases.title: Ransomware Encryption on Shared Project Drive
cases.description: Security incident: files on shared project drive encrypted with .lockbit extension. CrowdStrike EDR alert on 3 workstations. Hackathon planning documents inaccessible.

cases.title: Production API Keys Exposed in Public GitHub Repo
cases.description: Security incident: GitHub secret scanning detected production AWS access keys in public repository nasscom/event-platform. Repo was public for 6 hours before takedown.

cases.title: Unauthorized Login From Foreign IP on Admin Console
cases.description: Security incident: SIEM alert shows successful login to member portal admin console from IP 91.219.236.11 (Eastern Europe) at 3:12 AM IST. No approved travel.

cases.title: DLP Alert Member PII Data Sent to Personal Email
cases.description: Security incident: DLP flagged email containing member company PII database export sent to personal Gmail address. Employee attached CSV with 5000 member records by mistake.
